name: group-debug-deploy-expert
description: Universal debug & deploy expert for multi-project instances with 21 iron principles, 11-role AI team, and ZERO-TH LAW project isolation. Enterprise-grade debugging and deployment framework for AI agents.
long_description: Comprehensive debugging and deployment expert skill framework featuring: 21 immutable Iron Principles governing truth, operational discipline, environment control, scope management, compatibility, and security; 11-Role AI Digital Worker Team (Architect, Backend, Frontend, DevOps, QA, Security, Data, Mobile, Product Owner, Scrum Master, Technical Writer); Project Absolute Isolation (ZERO-TH LAW) ensuring complete separation between multiple project instances; Anti-Hallucination Deep Enforcement System (H13-H17); Anti-Goal-Drift Defense Mechanism (P20) detecting D1-D4 drift types; Error Rollback & Anti-Loop Defense System; Core File Protection Constitution (TIER 0 4-tier hierarchy); Progressive Disclosure Context Optimization (3-level loading); FIA File Integrity Audit Protocol.
